message:
fix(lab): prefix unused variable with underscore to fix clippy

The `old_time` variable in `inject_clock_skew` is only used inside
`tracing_compat::warn!` which compiles to a no-op when the
tracing-integration feature is disabled, triggering unused-variable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
